info.name: Lodge Management System

request.description: Public health check. Returns 200 OK when the server is running.
Authenticate with email and password. Saves token to `token` collection variable automatically.
Returns the currently authenticated user decoded from the JWT.
JWT is stateless — logout is handled client-side by discarding the token.
Change the authenticated user's own password. Validates against the active password policy.
Returns a randomly generated password that satisfies the active password policy.
Returns the authenticated user's profile. Available to all roles.
Create a new system user. Requires admin role. Saves returned `id` to `user_id` variable. A welcome email with credentials is sent to the user.
Paginated list of all system users. Returns SystemUser shape: id, full_name, email, role, status, last_login, created_at.
Get a single user by their UUID.
Update a user's full_name, email, role, status, or password. All fields optional. Include `password` only when resetting.
Permanently delete a user. Use with caution.
Permanently lock a user account until an admin explicitly unlocks it.
Unlock a locked user account and reset their failed login attempt counter.
Assign a role by UUID. Use PUT /users/{id} with `role` name string for the simpler approach.
Generate a temporary password and send it to the user's email. Forces password change on next login.
Paginated list of all rooms. Filterable by type and availability. Available to all authenticated staff.
Returns rooms with no confirmed or checked_in bookings overlapping [check_in, check_out). Used by the booking wizard.
Get a single room by UUID.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Room 101",
  "type": "double",
  "capacity": 2,
  "price_per_night": 250.00,
  "amenities": ["WiFi", "Air Conditioning", "En-suite Bathroom"],
  "description": "Spacious double room with garden view"
}

request.description: Create a new room. Requires admin or manager role. Room types: single, double, suite, cabin, conference. Saves returned `id` to `room_id` variable.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Room 101",
  "type": "double",
  "capacity": 2,
  "price_per_night": 280.00,
  "amenities": ["WiFi", "Air Conditioning", "En-suite Bathroom", "Mini Bar"],
  "description": "Spacious double room with garden view and mini bar",
  "is_available": true
}

request.description: Update a room's details. All fields are optional — only provided fields are applied. Requires admin or manager.
Toggle a room's availability flag. Use `false` to take it offline (maintenance, etc), `true` to restore it. Requires admin or manager.
Permanently delete a room. Requires admin or manager.
Get the current global password policy configuration.
Update the global password policy. All fields optional — only provided fields are updated.
List individual clients with optional search and status filter.
Get a single individual client by ID.
Create a new individual client record.
Update an individual client. Only provided fields are changed.
Delete an individual client by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

query.description: Search by company name or email

request.description: List corporate clients with optional search and status filter.
Get a single corporate client by ID.
Create a new corporate client record.
Update a corporate client. Only provided fields are changed.
Delete a corporate client by ID. Requires admin or manager role.
Paginated list of all bookings. Filterable by status, client_type, and client_id. Available to all authenticated staff.
Get a single booking by UUID.

Create a new booking in pending status. Validates room capacity, date range, and checks for overlapping confirmed/checked_in bookings. Requires admin, manager, or receptionist role. Saves returned `id` to `booking_id` variable.
Update a booking's dates, guests, or special requests. Only allowed while the booking is in pending status. All fields are optional. Requires admin, manager, or receptionist role.

Advance a booking through its lifecycle. Valid transitions:
- pending → confirmed (locks the room)
- pending → cancelled (frees the room)
- confirmed → checked_in
- confirmed → cancelled (frees the room)
- checked_in → checked_out (frees the room)

Requires admin or manager role.
Permanently delete a booking. Not allowed when status is checked_in. Requires admin or manager role.
Paginated list of all meal plans. Filter by is_active. Available to all authenticated staff.
Get a single meal plan by UUID.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Full Board",
  "price_per_person_per_night": 85.00,
  "includes": ["Breakfast", "Lunch", "Dinner"],
  "description": "Three meals a day included",
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Create a new meal plan. Requires admin or manager role. Saves returned `id` to `meal_plan_id` variable.
Update a meal plan. All fields optional. Requires admin or manager role.
Permanently delete a meal plan. Requires admin or manager role.
Paginated list of all invoices. Filterable by status. Requires admin or manager role.
Get a single invoice by UUID. Requires admin, manager, or receptionist role.
Fetch the invoice for a given booking. Useful when you already have a booking_id and want its invoice without a separate lookup. Available to all authenticated staff.

Advance an invoice through its lifecycle. Valid transitions:
- draft → issued
- draft → cancelled
- issued → paid (include paid_date)
- issued → overdue
- issued → cancelled
- overdue → paid (include paid_date)
- overdue → cancelled

Requires admin or manager role.
Returns the list of supported workflow type constants (e.g. booking_approval).
Create a new workflow template. Saves returned `id` to `workflow_id` variable.
List all workflow templates.
Get a single workflow template by ID.
Returns the complete workflow structure — all steps and transitions in one response.
Update a workflow template's name, description, or active status.
Soft-delete: marks the workflow as inactive.
Permanently delete a workflow template and all its steps/transitions.
Add a step to a workflow. Saves returned `id` to `step_id`.
Get a single workflow step.

item.name: Steps — Get All Steps for Workflow

request.description: List all steps for a workflow, ordered by step_order.
Update an existing workflow step.
Delete a workflow step. Also removes all transitions referencing this step.
List all transitions that originate from this step.
Define a valid transition between two steps. Saves returned `id` to `transition_id`.
List all transitions for a workflow.
Update a workflow transition.
Delete a workflow transition.
Get all workflow tasks assigned to the authenticated user.
Shortcut to get only pending tasks for the authenticated user.
Get full details of a specific assigned task.
Start a new workflow instance. Saves returned `id` to `instance_id`.
Perform an action on a workflow instance (e.g. approve, reject).
Find the workflow instance associated with a specific business task ID (e.g. a booking UUID).
Get the full audit trail of actions taken on a workflow instance.
